# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security updates are provided for the latest code on the default branch.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue, please report it privately to the maintainer.

- Do not create a public issue for sensitive vulnerabilities.
- Include reproduction steps, impact, and affected versions.
- You will receive acknowledgement and triage updates as soon as possible.

Thank you for helping keep this project secure.
